mnemonics: Synopsis 5 Deep: Submit a 5-point deep summary for Module 5
keyPoints: A synopsis is a concise summary of your project proposal
It outlines the problem, methodology, and expected outcomes
Submission is typically required to get approval before proceeding with full project work
commonMistakes: Making the synopsis too vague or lacking specific technical details
Failing to clearly state the reinforcement learning or deep learning techniques to be used
Not following the specific formatting or length requirements set by the module
